calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Unopposed Motion And Motion For Entry Of [Proposed] Final Judgment On Consent For Permanent Injunction And Civil Penalties; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Entry Of [Proposed] Final Judgment On Consent For Permanent Injunction And Civil Penalties.

The unopposed motion for entry of judgment is granted. The court will sign the consent judgment attached as Exhibit A to the parties' stipulation.

Proposed order and judgment submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
